info.title: Zupy API v2
info.description: Zupy API v2 — versioned, gateway-aware API with envelope responses, RFC 7807 errors, and multi-auth support (JWT, API Key, Device Key).

post.description: Send OTP code to customer's phone or email. Used when integration requires identity verification. Authentication via X-API-Key header (partner API key).

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: Partner API key

post.description: Verify OTP code and return session token with customer data. Creates customer if new. Session token valid for 30 minutes. Authentication via X-API-Key header (partner API key).
post.summary: Verify OTP and return customer session

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: Partner API key

get.description: List all companies accessible to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor value from previous response.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

get.description: Retrieve the company profile associated with the authenticated user's current context.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this company.

get.description: Paginated customer list with filters for name, email, phone, card code, tier, and RFM segment.

parameters.name: card_code
parameters.description: Filter by card number/code (case-insensitive contains)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor value from previous response.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter by email address (case-insensitive contains)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by customer name (case-insensitive contains)

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Filter by phone number (digits only, case-insensitive contains)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: General text search across name, email, phone, and card code

parameters.name: segment
parameters.description: Filter by RFM segment (champions, loyal, promising, at_risk, new)

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Filter by loyalty tier (exact match: default, bronze, silver, gold, platinum, vip)

get.description: Retrieve a single customer's profile including contact details, loyalty tier, and segment.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this customer.

post.description: Atomically mark a coupon as used, creating an activity record. Prevents double-usage via select_for_update. Auto-expires coupons past valid_until.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this customer.

get.description: Get customer's current points balance summary.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this customer.

post.description: Add loyalty points to a customer's balance. Delegates to LoyaltyUser.add_points(). All async side effects (Z$ distribution, RFM, wallet push) preserved.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this customer.

get.description: Get paginated points transaction history for a customer.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this customer.

post.description: Redeem a reward using points (default) or Z$ topping (use_z_tokens=true). Delegates to LoyaltyUserService or MultiPaymentRewardService. All async side effects (wallet card, Z$ split, notifications) preserved.
post.summary: Redeem a reward for a customer

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this customer.

get.description: Query on-chain Z$ compressed token balance via Photon API. Returns 200 with error field on timeout/failure (graceful degradation).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this customer.

get.description: List all loyalty programs for the authenticated company.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor value from previous response.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

get.description: Retrieve a loyalty program's configuration including tiers, points rules, and enrollment URL.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this loyalty program.

get.description: List available rewards for the company. Optionally filter by redeemability for a specific customer.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor value from previous response.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: Customer KSUID — required when redeemable=true. Also annotates already_redeemed flag on each reward.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: redeemable
parameters.description: Filter to rewards the customer can redeem (has enough points and hasn't hit redemption limit). Requires customer_id.

get.description: Retrieve a single reward from the catalog including points cost, redemption limits, and availability.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this reward.

get.description: List active coupons with remaining usage counts and expiry dates.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor value from previous response.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

post.description: Send a push notification to the customer's device via an active wallet pass.
post.summary: Send push notification via wallet pass

get.description: List all wallet passes (loyalty + coupon) issued to a specific customer.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: Customer KSUID

get.description: Check the current status of a wallet pass (active, expired, voided).

parameters.name: pass_id
parameters.description: Pass KSUID

post.description: Generate an Apple/Google wallet pass for a redeemed coupon.
Generate an Apple/Google wallet pass for a customer's loyalty card.

Receives JSON data from integration partners (e.g. Repediu, Saipos). Authenticates via per-company API key (X-API-Key header), persists to WebhookEvent, and dispatches async processing. Idempotent — duplicate payloads return 200 with status 'duplicate'.

parameters.name: X-API-Key
parameters.description: Per-company API key for this integration partner

parameters.name: partner
parameters.description: Integration partner slug (e.g. 'repediu', 'saipos')

ActivityTypeEnum.description: Activity type classification for loyalty events.

CompanyProfile.description: Company profile with business details, loyalty program statistics, and configuration.

logo_uuid.description: UUID identifier for company logo stored in CDN. Points to 2 formats: logo.png (512x512), icon.png (256x256). Use CDNService.get_logo_formats() to construct URLs.

social_links.description: Social media links. Keys: instagram, tiktok, linkedin, x, whatsapp

menu_url.title: Menu/Store URL
menu_url.description: Digital menu or online store URL (e.g., digital menu, e-commerce)

subscription_tier.description:
Current subscription tier from Stripe product metadata

* `essential` - Essential
* `connection` - Connection
* `engagement` - Engagement
* `alliance` - Alliance

is_branch.title: Is Branch/Unit
is_branch.description: Indicates if this company is a branch/unit of another company

branch_name.title: Branch/Unit Name
branch_name.description: Name of the branch/unit, if applicable

is_public.title: Public
is_public.description: If enabled, this company will be visible in the public directory.

status.title: Account Status
status.description:
Account status: active, locked (chargeback/fraud), or suspended

* `active` - Ativo
* `locked` - Bloqueado
* `suspended` - Suspended

CouponInventory.description: Active coupon with usage tracking, expiration details, and associated reward information.

total_usages_allowed.description: Total allowed usages (snapshot from reward at redemption time)

CouponInventoryStatusEnum.description:
* `active` - Ativo
* `used` - Utilizado
* `expired` - Expirado
* `cancelled` - Cancelado
* `pending` - Pending
* `pending_blockchain` - Pending Blockchain
* `completed` - Completed
* `failed` - Failed
* `blockchain_error` - Blockchain Error

CouponPassResponse.description: Coupon pass generation result with pass URL and status.

CouponValidateResponse.description: Coupon validation result with current status and remaining usages.

Customer.description: Customer profile with personal details, loyalty status, and contact information.

points_earned.title: Total Points Earned
points_earned.description: Total points earned in this program.

points_spent.title: Total Points Spent
points_spent.description: Total points spent in this program.

card_number.description: Card identifier in format ZP-UNIQUEID-PID that matches the wallet card barcode

last_activity_date.description: Date of customer's last activity in the program

DiscountTypeEnum.description:
* `none` - Nenhum
* `percentage` - Percentage
* `fixed_amount` - Fixed Amount
* `free_shipping` - Free Shipping
* `free_item` - Free Item
* `conditional` - Conditional

FieldError.description: Individual field error in a validation error response.

LoyaltyProgram.description: Loyalty program details including configuration, rewards catalog, and customer statistics.

slug.description: Used in public URL (e.g., zupy.com/@slug). Only superusers can modify.

enrollment_url.description: Public enrollment URL for this loyalty program

points_name.description: Custom name for points in this program (e.g., Stars, Coins).

point_expiration_days.title: Point Expiration (Days)
point_expiration_days.description: Number of days before points expire. 0 means never.

points_per_currency.title: Points per Currency Unit
points_per_currency.description: How many points are earned per currency unit spent.

minimum_points_redemption.title: Minimum Points for Redemption
minimum_points_redemption.description: Minimum points required for any redemption.

is_public.title: Public Program
is_public.description: If enabled, this program will be visible in the public directory.

tiers_enabled.description: If enabled, this program will use the tier system with Bronze/Silver/Gold tiers. If disabled, all users will use the default tier.

welcome_reward_type.title: Tipo de Presente de Boas-Vindas
welcome_reward_type.description: Type of welcome gift new users receive upon enrollment

welcome_points_bonus.title: Welcome Bonus Points
welcome_points_bonus.description: Number of bonus points automatically awarded to new users

profile_completion_enabled.title: Ativar Incentivo de Perfil Completo
profile_completion_enabled.description: When enabled, users receive points upon completing 100% of their profile

profile_completion_points.title: Pontos ao Completar Perfil
profile_completion_points.description: Number of points the user receives upon completing 100% of their profile

channel.description: Delivery channel: whatsapp, email, or sms

is_new.description: True if customer was just created

otp_session.description: Session token (30min TTL) for subsequent OTP-protected requests

PaginationMeta.description: Cursor-based pagination metadata matching envelope middleware output.

PassListResponse.description: Customer wallet pass summary with type, platform, and status.

PassStatusResponse.description: Detailed wallet pass status for a specific pass.

PointsAddRequest.description: Request parameters for adding points to a customer's loyalty balance.

PointsBalance.description: Summary of a customer's loyalty points balance, including earned, spent, and current tier.

PointsHistory.description: Individual points transaction record with operation details, amounts, and timestamps.

points_amount.description: Points earned or spent in this activity (negative for spending)

activity_date.description: When the activity occurred (preserved from legacy system)

PointsOperationResponse.description: Result of a points operation (add or reduce) with updated balance.

RewardCatalog.description: Available reward in the loyalty program catalog with points cost and validity details.

reward_type.description: Functional reward type. Use 'Generic' for rewards that don't fit other categories.

monetary_value.description: The approximate monetary value of this reward.

validity_days.title: Validity Days After Redemption
validity_days.description: Number of days the reward is valid after redemption.

quantity_available.description: Number of rewards available. Null means unlimited.

discount_type.description:
Type of discount applied when redeeming this reward

* `none` - Nenhum
* `percentage` - Percentage
* `fixed_amount` - Fixed Amount
* `free_shipping` - Free Shipping
* `free_item` - Free Item
* `conditional` - Conditional

RewardRedeemResponse.description: Reward redemption result with generated coupon code and points/Z$ deducted.

RewardTypeEnum.description: Reward type classification: other, generic, welcome, return, birthday, anniversary, referral, profile_completion, custom.

TierEnum.description: Loyalty tier levels: default, bronze, silver, gold, platinum, diamond.

TypeEnum.description:
* `points_update` - Points Update
* `coupon_available` - Coupon Available
* `program_update` - Program Update

ValidationError.description: RFC 7807 error with validation errors array.

WalletNotificationResponse.description: Wallet push notification result with notification ID and delivery status.

WalletPassResponse.description: Wallet pass generation result with pass URL and status.

WelcomeRewardTypeEnum.description: Welcome reward types: none, points (bonus points), reward (specific reward).

ZBalance.description: Customer's Z$ token balance and associated wallet address.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyAuth.description: API key for partner access via APISIX key-auth plugin

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Customer management, points, history, and data operations

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: Apple Wallet pass generation and notifications
